ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight for the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" REAL /* Numeric representation of the education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary level of the individual */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Anomaly score for the individual's data */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the individual's data */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version of the individual's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_salary FOREIGN KEY ("salary") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the workclass */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry associated with the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity associated with the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the native country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region associated with the native country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_scores" (
  "anomaly_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly score */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual the score belongs to */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the anomaly score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was calculated */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly score */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly score (e.g., data entry error, unusual pattern) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_scores_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary level */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Level of the salary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the salary level */,
  "range" TEXT /* Salary range (e.g., $50,000 - $75,000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, private, survey) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("data_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of data usage */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of data usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_result" TEXT /* Result of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "compliance_description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
